final_prompt.prompt:
Create a scene illustration of a warm family dinner gathering (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a warm, lived-in family-dinner aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a family gathered around a table, raising cups in celebration, expressions of joy and togetherness
Scene/backdrop: must include a Chinese round table (中式圆桌) with a steaming hotpot (火锅), walls covered with photos
Lighting/mood: needs warm yellow lighting with a cozy,烟火气 atmosphere — exact light source placement is yours
Color palette: needs a warm yellow direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
